description: Letter fragment from Isḥāq b. Khalaf, probably from Alexandria, to David b. Shaʿya, probably in Fustat. Around 1060. Mentions the arrival of Byzantine and Andalusī merchants, as well as the ships of Ibn al-Baʿbāʿ and Ibn Shiblūn, shipments of textiles, and a deal in Byzantine quarter-dinars. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #738) VMR
tags: coins, Byzantines, Byzantine merchants, Andalusi merchants, Ibn al-Ba'ba', Byzantine coins
